channel.title: Abnormal Security Threat Intel Blog (Custom Feed)

item.title: Phishing Sense of Urgency: Why the Brain Falls for It
item.description: Learn why phishing sense of urgency bypasses rational thinking and how to train teams to pause, verify, and stop clicking malicious links.

item.title: AI Governance Responsibilities for Security Leaders
item.description: Learn how to assign AI governance responsibilities across security, legal, and leadership functions to meet emerging compliance requirements.

item.title: Cybersecurity Regulatory Compliance for Security Engineers
item.description: Learn how security engineers implement cybersecurity regulatory compliance across HIPAA, GDPR, PCI-DSS, and NIST frameworks effectively.

item.title: Cybersecurity Regulations in 2026 for Security Leaders
item.description: Cybersecurity regulations are shifting fast. Learn what security leaders need to know about federal, state, and AI-specific compliance requirements.

item.title: Microsoft 365 Email Security: Built-In Protection Guide
item.description: Learn how Microsoft 365 email security works, where native protections fall short, and how behavioral AI closes gaps SEGs and Defender miss.

item.title: Email Security Without the Configuration Tax
item.description: Why transparency in email security shouldn’t require ongoing rule maintenance.

item.title: Deciphering Identity Threats: New Tools to Track, Search, and Classify Account Takeovers
item.description: Abnormal expands Email Account Takeover Protection with centralized visibility into organizational trends, suspicious user activity, and attacker access paths.

item.title: How to Get a Job in Cybersecurity: What CISOs Want
item.description: Learn how to get a job in cybersecurity from CISOs. Discover why passion beats certifications and how to stand out in security interviews.

item.title: Cyber Security Operations: Building Modern SecOps Teams
item.description: Build effective cybersecurity operations teams with proven strategies for automation, cross-training, and analyst retention. CISO insights included.

item.title: Mean Time to Mitigate (MTTM) Explained: Calculation & Tips
item.description: Discover why mean time to mitigate matters more than MTTR for SOC teams. Learn how to calculate MTTM and reduce containment time with automation.

item.title: 15 Top Cybersecurity Automation Tools for Enterprise in 2026
item.description: Compare cybersecurity automation tools for enterprise SOCs across SIEM, SOAR, XDR, and email security. Evaluation frameworks and implementation tips included.

item.title: AI Phishing Investigations: Slash SOC Response Time
item.description: Learn how AI phishing investigations automate triage and cut response time from hours to minutes. Implementation strategies from CISOs included.

item.title: What Is SOC Automation? Key Benefits & Use Cases
item.description: Learn what SOC automation is and how it reduces alert fatigue. Discover use cases, benefits, and best practices to transform your security operations.

item.title: Cybersecurity Career Paths: Entry-Level to CISO Roadmap
item.description: Explore cybersecurity career paths from SOC analyst to CISO. Learn which skills hiring managers value most and how to accelerate your security career.

item.title: Reduce SOC Workload with AI: 7 Automation Strategies
item.description: Discover 7 proven strategies to reduce SOC workload with AI. Cut alert fatigue, automate low-value tasks, and free analysts for meaningful security work.

item.title: Healthcare Cybersecurity Compliance: HIPAA, HITRUST, or NIST?
item.description: Healthcare cybersecurity compliance starts with choosing the right framework. Compare HIPAA, HITRUST, and NIST to find the best fit for your organization.

item.title: Cybersecurity in Healthcare: A Complete Guide for Security Leaders
item.description: Cybersecurity in healthcare protects patient data, clinical systems, and care delivery. Learn the threats, regulations, and defenses that matter most.

item.title: Healthcare Cloud Security: Protecting Patient Data in the Cloud
item.description: Healthcare cloud security starts with identity-first controls. Learn how to protect patient data across hybrid environments without disrupting care delivery.

item.title: HIPAA Secure Email Requirements: What Healthcare Orgs Must Know
item.description: HIPAA secure email requirements cover encryption, access controls, and BAAs. Learn how to meet compliance while defending against modern email threats.

item.title: Email Security for Healthcare: Top 5 Threats to Watch
item.description: Email security for healthcare must address phishing, BEC, ransomware, credential theft, and vendor attacks. See how behavioral AI defends the inbox.

item.title: Starkiller Phishing Framework Proxies Real Login Pages to Bypass MFA
item.description: Go inside Starkiller's control panel to see how headless browsers and reverse proxies enable enterprise-grade phishing infrastructure with MFA bypass.

item.title: Top 5 Microsoft 365 Security Gaps Exposed by Abnormal (and How to Close Them)
item.description: Discover the top Microsoft 365 security gaps identified across Abnormal deployments and how Security Posture Management helps close them.

item.title: KI‑basierte E‑Mail‑Angriffe: Einfach gestartet, kaum zu stoppen
item.description: Abnormal AI provides advanced cloud email security to prevent credential phishing, business email compromise, account takeover, and more.

item.title: AI-Native, Not AI-Augmented: Why Architecture Matters in the Age of AI Attacks
item.description: AI-powered attacks demand AI-native security. Explore how foundational platform architecture shapes detection accuracy, automated response, and modern cyber defense.

item.title: Enterprise Mailbox Security: Cloud Email Protection Guide
item.description: Discover how mailbox security detects account takeover, data exfiltration, and phishing attacks that bypass email gateways using behavioral AI.

item.title: DMARC Bypass Techniques: Risks CISOs Must Know
item.description: Learn how attackers exploit DMARC bypass techniques, audit vendor exceptions, and strengthen email authentication with behavioral AI detection.

item.title: Direct Send Abuse: Detection and Prevention Guide
item.description: Learn how direct send abuse bypasses M365 email security, how to detect it in your environment, and how to prevent internal phishing attacks.

item.title: Microsoft Exchange Online Protection: What EOP Covers
item.description: Discover what Microsoft Exchange Online Protection defends against, where it falls short, and how to close the gaps attackers exploit.

item.title: Microsoft Direct Send Vulnerability Explained
item.description: Learn how attackers exploit the Microsoft Direct Send vulnerability to bypass email gateways and deliver phishing campaigns directly to employees' inboxes.

item.title: Security Awareness Programs That Drive Real Results
item.description: Learn how to build security awareness programs that change employee behavior, reduce risk, and create lasting defenses against social engineering attacks.
